title: Welcome to The ok.mairr Chronicle
body:
This is your personal newspaper — a place to publish what you write, photograph, and film for the world to read and watch.

Sign in at the Editor's Desk to post your first story, upload a photograph, or share a video. Every edition begins with a single line of ink.

— ok.mairr, Editor-in-Chief
excerpt: Your personal newspaper for stories, photographs, and moving pictures. The first edition awaits.
